tools.name: add_library
tools.description: Add an Expo library to the project using expo install and attach usage instructions when available.
tools.examplePrompt: add sqlite and basic CRUD to the app

tools.name: search_documentation
tools.description: Search the official Expo documentation and return page URLs ranked by relevance for a user query. Use read_documentation to fetch the full content of specific pages, starting from the top.
tools.examplePrompt: search documentation for CNG

tools.name: read_documentation
tools.description: Fetch a single Expo documentation page and return its content as markdown. Returns up to ~5000 tokens per call. Use offset to paginate through long pages.
tools.examplePrompt: read the Expo Router docs page

tools.name: learn
tools.description: Learn Expo how-to for a specific topic and remember it for future conversations. Use this to teach the assistant about specific Expo features or workflows.
tools.examplePrompt: learn how to use expo-router

tools.name: workflow_create
tools.description: Creates a new EAS workflow YAML file for Expo projects or fetches workflow syntax documentation. Use this when users want to create CI/CD workflows in .eas/workflows/ or need to learn EAS workflow syntax. After creating, use workflow_validate to validate the file.
tools.examplePrompt: create a CI/CD workflow for building and deploying

tools.name: workflow_info
tools.description: Fetches detailed information about a specific EAS workflow run by ID. Use this to check the status, job results, errors, and artifacts of a workflow run. If workflow has multiple jobs, draw them in a diagram to show the dependencies between jobs.
tools.examplePrompt: get the status of the latest workflow run

tools.name: workflow_list
tools.description: Lists recent EAS workflow runs for a project. Provide either appId (from app.json "extra.eas.projectId") OR appFullName (e.g., "@owner/my-app").
tools.examplePrompt: list the recent workflow runs

tools.name: workflow_logs
tools.description: Fetches logs for a specific job in an EAS workflow run. Call without sectionIndex or phase to get a summary of log sections (phase names and line ranges); then call again with sectionIndex or phase to fetch that section.
tools.examplePrompt: show me the logs for the build job in the workflow

tools.name: workflow_run
tools.description: Triggers an EAS workflow run from a git reference. Provide either appId (from app.json "extra.eas.projectId") OR appFullName (e.g., "@owner/my-app"). The workflow file must exist at the specified git reference.
tools.examplePrompt: run the build-and-deploy workflow

tools.name: workflow_cancel
tools.description: Cancels a running EAS workflow. Use workflow_info to get the workflow run ID.
tools.examplePrompt: cancel the running workflow

tools.name: workflow_validate
tools.description: Validates EAS workflow YAML syntax and configuration. Use this after creating a workflow to ensure it is valid. Provide either appId (from app.json "extra.eas.projectId") OR appFullName (e.g., "@owner/my-app").
tools.examplePrompt: validate my workflow file

tools.name: build_list
tools.description: Lists EAS builds for a project. Provide either appId (from app.json "extra.eas.projectId") OR appFullName (e.g., "@owner/my-app"). Use this to see recent builds, their status, and available artifacts.
tools.examplePrompt: list the recent builds for this project

tools.name: build_info
tools.description: Fetches the status and detailed information about a specific EAS build by ID. Use this to check build status, errors, artifacts, and other details.
tools.examplePrompt: get the status of my latest iOS build

tools.name: build_logs
tools.description: Fetches the logs for a specific EAS build. The build must be completed (finished or errored) to have logs available.
tools.examplePrompt: show me the logs for the failed build

tools.name: build_submit
tools.description: Submits an EAS build to the app store (Google Play Store for Android, App Store for iOS). The build must be a finished build with the appropriate distribution type. Provide either appId (from app.json "extra.eas.projectId") OR appFullName (e.g., "@owner/my-app").
tools.examplePrompt: submit the latest build to the App Store

tools.name: build_run
tools.description: Triggers a new EAS build using a build profile from eas.json. Requires a GitHub repository to be connected to the project. Provide either appId (from app.json "extra.eas.projectId") OR appFullName (e.g., "@owner/my-app").
tools.examplePrompt: run a production build for iOS

tools.name: build_cancel
tools.description: Cancels an EAS build that is queued or in progress. Use build_info to check the current status first.
tools.examplePrompt: cancel the build that is currently in progress

tools.name: testflight_crashes
tools.description: Fetch TestFlight crash data. Without crashId, lists recent crashes. With crashId, returns the full crash log with stack trace.
tools.examplePrompt: show me recent TestFlight crashes

tools.name: testflight_feedback
tools.description: Fetch screenshot feedback from TestFlight. Returns feedback metadata including device info, user comments, and screenshot URLs.
tools.examplePrompt: show TestFlight feedback for my app

tools.name: expo_router_sitemap
tools.description: Query the all routes of the current expo-router project. This is useful if you were using expo-router and want to know all the routes of the app.
tools.examplePrompt: check the expo-router-sitemap output

tools.name: open_devtools
tools.description: Open the React Native DevTools.
tools.examplePrompt: open devtools

tools.name: collect_app_logs
tools.description: Collect logs from native device (logcat/syslog) or JavaScript console.
tools.examplePrompt: collect app logs from the iOS simulator

tools.name: automation_tap
tools.description: Tap on the device at the given coordinates (x, y) or by react-native testID. Provide either (x AND y) or testID.
tools.examplePrompt: tap the screen at x=12, y=22

tools.name: automation_take_screenshot
tools.description: Take screenshot of the full app or a specific view by react-native testID. Optionally provide testID to screenshot a specific view.
tools.examplePrompt: take a screenshot and verify the blue circle view

tools.name: automation_find_view
tools.description: Find view and dump its properties. This is useful to verify the view is rendered correctly.
tools.examplePrompt: dump properties for testID 'button-123'

prompts.name: expo_router_sitemap
prompts.description: Query the all routes of the current expo-router project using `expo-router-sitemap`.
